items.name: Deed: Dev
items.description: Weird... you shouldn't have this.

items.name: Deed: Blank
items.description: Weird... you shouldn't have this.

items.name: Deed: Hairstyle - High Ponytail
items.description: A hairstyle with bangs and a high ponytail

items.name: Deed: Hairstyle - Trailer Handband
items.description: A hairstyle from the trailer

items.name: Deed: Hairstyle - Full Mohawk
items.description: A hairstyle with a tall mohawk and shaped stripes on the sides.

items.name: Deed: Hairstyle - Side Undercut
items.description: A longer hairstyle swept with one side shaved

items.description: A mask with pointed ear-like extrusions

items.description: A mask designed in to resemble a cat.

items.description: A mask with two rounded horns on the top of your head

items.description: A mask with four extruding spikes

items.name: Deed: Mask - Demon Horn Mask
items.description: A mask with curling horns

items.name: Deed: Mask - Uneven Horn Mask
items.description: A mask with curling horns pieced with gold rings. This mask was lost at sea ages ago.

items.name: Deed: Mask - Unihorn Mask
items.description: A mask with with a single spike in the middle of your forehead

items.name: Deed: Mask - Drooping Ear Mask
items.description: This mask has droopy ears, almost reminiscent of a Nubi Goat's ears. Maybe it was inspired by them?

items.name: Deed: Mask - Bug Mask
items.description: A armored mask giving the appearance of a bug

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Arch Blue
items.description: A mask with a pattern of a simple arch

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Arch Yellow Eyes
items.description: A mask with a pattern of a simple arch

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Runic Blue
items.description: A mask with a pattern covered in runic lines

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Runic Yellow
items.description: A mask with a pattern covered in runic lines

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Flower Crown Blue
items.description: A mask with a pattern of a flower

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Sun Blue
items.description: A mask with a pattern of a glowing rising sun

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Arrows Blue
items.description: A mask with a pattern of a glowing arrow

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Waves Blue
items.description: A mask with a pattern of glowing waves

items.name: Deed: Mask Pattern - Waves Pink
items.description: A mask with a pattern of glowing waves

items.name: Deed: Hair Color - Hexite
items.description: Glowing strands of hexite infused hair

items.name: Deed: Hair Color - White
items.description: Snow white hair

items.name: Deed: Hair Color - Charcoal
items.description: Dark, almost black hair

items.name: Deed: Hair Color - Brown
items.description: Dark brown hair

items.name: Deed: Cervus (I)
items.description: A cervus mount that can be ridden for faster traversal. Faster than the goat but not as good at traversing challenging terrain.

items.name: Deed: Cart
items.description: A cart that can transport items and cargo.

items.name: Deed: Wagon
items.description: A wagon that can transport large amounts of cargo.

items.name: Deed: Raft
items.description: A small raft that could transport another player and a small amount of cargo. Purchased from Svim.

items.name: Deed: Skiff
items.description: A small boat suitable for navigating rivers and lakes and capable of sailing in the ocean.

items.name: Deed: Fisher's Boat
items.description: A large boat that can carry several passengers as well as a large amount of cargo. Purchased from Brico.

items.name: Deed: Cheater's Boat
items.description: A boat you shouldn't have

items.name: Ancient Cloth
items.description: Cloth from the ancient civilization. The twins would be very interested in this.

items.name: Ancient Research
items.description: Research from the ancient civilization. A scholar would be very interested in this.

items.name: Mark of Heimlich
items.description: A token of Heimlich's appreciation. Heimlich would accept these in exchange for repairing Power Sources for you.

items.name: Brico Buck
items.description: A currency of previous high value, burried by Brico. It's value has since decayed to a hundreth of a hex coin.

items.name: Mark of the Twins
items.description: A currency earned through selling cloth or ancient goods to the twins. Can be used to buy various cosmetic goods from the Twins.

items.name: Ancient Journal Page #1
items.description: Read to learn knowledge...

items.description: Read to learn knowledge...

items.name: Cooling Energy
items.description: A vessel that contains a faint, blue energy. It's cold to the touch. Could be used to craft a cooling capacitor at a smithing station.

items.name: Warming Energy
items.description: A vessel that contains a faint, orange energy. It's warm to the touch. Could be used to craft a heated capacitor at a smithing station.

items.name: Ripped Notes
items.description: A fragment of some instructions that seem to detail the creation of a component for a power source to protect from the heat. Maybe a scholar could decipher this?

items.name: Shredded Notes
items.description: A fragment of some instructions that seem to detail the creation of a component for a power source to protect from the cold. Maybe a scholar could decipher this?

items.name: Energy or Notes
items.description: Notes or energy involved in making capacitors to protect from the cold or heat.

items.name: Cooling Capacitor
items.description: A component that could be used to expand the capacity of your Automata's Heart.

items.name: Heated Capacitor
items.description: A component that could be used to expand the capacity of your Automata's Heart.

items.name: Schematic: Cooling Capacitor
items.description: Instructions for how to create a component for a power source to protect from the heat.

items.name: Schematic: Heated Capacitor
items.description: Instructions for how to create a component for a power source to protect from the cold.

items.name: Schematic: Heimlich's House
items.description: Instructions for how to set up a house to Heimlich's liking. Heimlich will take up residence in the house where you can buy and trade with him more conveniently.

items.name: Ancient Key Mold
items.description: A mold to make a key. For use in this ruin.

items.name: Ancient Enadarite
items.description: An ancient piece of Enadarite. This ingot seems to be infused with some kind of energy. It might be attuned to something in this ruin?

items.name: Ancient Enadarite Key
items.description: A key forged from a mold to open a door in this ruin.

items.name: Miracle Drink
items.description: A magic drink you shouldn't have.

items.name: Boots of Haste
items.description: Magical boots you shouldn't have.

items.name: Teleport Crystal
items.description: Lets you teleport at someone's location

items.name: Stick
items.description: A regular stick harvested from bushes or stickpiles. Could be used for crafting or building.

items.name: Knapped Flint
items.description: A small shard of flint rock. Brittle, but sharp.

items.name: Wild Grain
items.description: Dry seed that could be used to make food.

items.name: Wild Vegetable
items.description: A wild onion that could be used to make food.

items.description: An empty wood bucket, could be filled with water from a well.

items.name: Water Bucket
items.description: A bucket full of fresh water.

items.name: Pitch
items.description: A sticky material made by processing tree sap in a kiln. Could be used as sealant

items.name: Bone Glue
items.description: Glue made from animal bones and fat. Could be used in construction and crafting.

items.name: Animal Fat
items.description: A lump of fat from an animal. Could be used for cooking or fuel in a pinch.

items.name: Tree Sap
items.description: A small amount of sticky tree resin.

items.description: An axe made from flint.

items.description: A machete made from flint.

items.name: Flint Quill
items.description: A quill made from flint.

items.name: Flint Tool Bundle
items.description: A bundle that contains all the tools you'll need to get started.

items.name: Argent Ore

items.name: Auric Ore
items.description: A piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed at a masonry's station.

items.name: Crushed Piece of Argent Ore
items.description: A crushed piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed into concentrate at a grinder.

items.name: Crushed Piece of Auric Ore
items.description: A crushed piece of ore with a tiny amount of precious metal in it. Could be processed into concentrate at a grinder.

items.description: A small amount concentrate made from precious metal. Could be processed into a nugget.

items.name: Auric Ore Concentrate
items.description: A small amount concentrate made from precious metal. Could be processed into a nugget.

items.name: Argent Nugget
items.description: A small amount of precious metal made by smelting concentrate. Could be made into an ingot at a smithing station.

items.name: Auric Nugget
items.description: A small amount of precious metal made by smelting concentrate. Could be made into an ingot at a smithing station.

items.name: Argent Ingot
items.description: An ingot of precious metal. Could be used to make some more advanced crafting recipes.

items.name: Auric Ingot
items.description: An ingot of precious metal. Could be used to make some more advanced crafting recipes.

items.name: Master Tool
items.description: A tool to rule them all

items.name: Art Of Cheating Scroll
items.description: Read this to learn all about cheating

items.name: Botter's Tool
items.description: A tool for botters.

items.name: Magnificent Leather Treatment
items.description: A treatment made by Scholars to purify leather further.

items.name: Buccaneer's Greenthread Charm (II)
items.description: A charm woven from some strange kind of plant.

items.name: Rough Wood Log
items.description: A cross section of a tree trunk harvested from trees or fallen trunks. Could be used to build or craft something.

items.name: Rough Tree Bark
items.description: A piece of tree bark. Could be used to make tannin at a leatherworking station.

items.name: Rough Charcoal
items.description: A piece of charcoal made from burning logs in a kiln, would make good fuel.

items.name: Ash
items.description: Residue from the charcoal used to burn this. Could be safely thrown away.

items.name: Birch Seed
items.description: A seed to plant a sapling in a tree pot.

items.name: Beech Seed
items.description: A seed to plant a sapling in a tree pot.

items.name: Oak Seed
items.description: A seed to plant a sapling in a tree pot.

items.name: Potted Birch Sapling
items.description: A potted sapling that's ready to be planted. Will grow into a young tree and eventually into a mature tree.

items.name: Potted Beech Sapling
items.description: A potted sapling that's ready to be planted. Will grow into a young tree and eventually into a mature tree.

items.name: Potted Oak Sapling
items.description: A potted sapling that's ready to be planted. Will grow into a young tree and eventually into a mature tree.

items.description: A planed piece of untreated wood made at a carptenry station. Could be used to build or craft something.

items.name: Rough Plank
items.description: A plank of wood sawed from stripped wood.

items.description: A plank of wood treated using oil at a carptenry station. Could be used to make more advanced structures.

items.name: Rough Pebbles

items.name: Rough Brick
items.description: A crude brick made of dried mud made in a kiln.

items.name: Crushed Ferralith Ore
items.description: A pile of crushed ore. Could be processed into concentrate at a by a smith.

items.description: Mortar needed for crafting stone blocks and buildings. Can be made at a masonry station.

items.description: A precious gem that could be used for rare crafts.

items.description: This could be used to forge gems.

items.name: Rough Forester's Pot
items.description: Could be used to plant a sapling to grow a tree.

items.name: Rough Unfired Forester's Pot
items.description: Could be used to plant a sapling to grow a tree.

items.name: Rough Rock
items.description: A piece of rock. Could be used for crafting or building.

items.name: Ferralith Ore Piece
items.description: A piece of rock with exposed bits of ore. Could be processed at a Smithing Station.

items.name: Ferralith Ore Concentrate
items.description: Ore that's been processed into a fine concentrate. Could be smelted into metal in a smelter.

items.name: Ferralith Ingot
items.description: A rectangular ingot of metal forged at a smithing station.

items.name: Ferralith Nails
items.description: A nail forged at a smithing station. Often used for construction.

items.name: Molten Ferralith
items.description: A bar of molten metal made by smelting concentrate.

items.name: High Quality Ferralith Ingot
items.description: A rectangular ingot of metal forged at a smithing station.

items.name: Rough Cleaned Pelt
items.description: A hide that has been cleaned and prepared for use. Can be used to make leather in a tanning tub.

items.name: Rough Leather
items.description: A large piece of leather. Could be used to build or craft something.

items.name: Rough Leather Straps
items.description: A thin strip of cut leather. Could be used to build or craft something.

items.name: High Quality Rough Leather
items.description: A large piece of high quality leather. Could be used for crafting or building.

items.name: Silken Hexmoth
items.description: Insects that could be used to make bait more efficiently for fishermen.

items.name: Hexmoth Cocoon
items.description: Could be unraveled at a loom to make silk cloth.

items.name: Rough Raw Pelt
items.description: A fresh pelt from a wild animal. Could be cleaned at a leatherworking station for use.

items.name: Basic Raw Meat
items.description: A piece of meat from a wild animal. Could be used as a cooking ingredient.

items.name: Animal Bones
items.description: A few small pieces of bone. Could be processed into glue in a kiln.

items.name: Rough Dried Pelt
items.description: A hide that has been dried and preserved. Could be used to make leather.

items.name: Basic Tannin
items.description: A material made from processing water and bark in a tanning tub. Used to tan leather.

items.name: Rough Fabric
items.description: A piece of fabric made from fibers. Could be used to make clothing.

items.name: Rough Cloth
items.description: A thick weave of cloth made by a tailor.

items.name: Rough Twine
items.description: A strand of thin cordage made from plant fiber at a tailoring station.

items.name: Rough Rope
items.description: A thick rope made out of multiple strands of cordage. Could be used for crafting or building.

items.name: High Quality Rough Cloth
items.description: A thick weave of cloth made by a tailor.

items.name: Rough Spool Of Thread
items.description: A spool of thread made from fibers. Can be used to make cloth strips and some buildings.

items.name: Hexmoth Silk Cloth
items.description: Smooth, silk cloth processed at a loom from the cocoon of a Hexmoth. Various travelers would be interested in this.

items.name: Basic Fertilizer
items.description: A basic fertilizer made at a farming station. Used for fertilizing crops.

items.name: Wild Grain Seeds
items.description: A wild grain seed. Can be grown into a better crop by farmers.

items.name: Wild Vegetable Seeds
items.description: Can be turned into white onion seeds by a farmer.

items.name: Basic Embergrain Seeds
items.description: Can be grown into an Embergrain plant in a farming field.

items.name: Basic Embergrain Plant
items.description: Can be split into Embergrain to cook or Embergrain Seeds to replant.

items.name: Basic Embergrain
items.description: Embergrains which could be cooked into dough.

items.name: Basic Starbulb Seeds
items.description: Can be grown into a Starlight Onion Plant in a farming field.

items.name: Basic Starbulb Plant
items.description: Can be husked into Starlight Onions to eat or Starlight Onion Seeds to replant.

items.name: Basic Starbulb
items.description: A Starlight Onion. Maybe a cook could make something good out of this?

items.name: Wild Fiberplant Seeds
items.description: Can be grown into a domesticated plant which produces filaments.

items.name: Basic Wispweave Seeds
items.description: Can be grown into a Wispweave Plant in a farming field. Produces filaments used for making cloth.

items.name: Basic Wispweave Plant
items.description: Can be split into Wispweave Filament for tailoring and Wispweave Seeds to replant.

items.name: Rough Wispweave Filament
items.description: A finer cloth filament that could be used to make cloth. Grown by farmers.

items.name: Basic Tropical Rice Seeds
items.description: Can be grown into a Rice Seedling in a farming field.

items.name: Basic Tropical Rice Seedling
items.description: Can be planted in shallow waters in tropical regions. Use the context menu on this item to plant.

items.name: Tropical Rice
items.description: A sweet rice found in tropical regions, which can be used to create a wide variety of dishes.

items.name: Basic Bait
items.description: Bait made at a fishing station. Could be used to catch larger fish.

items.name: Basic Fish Oil
items.description: Oil made from fish. Can be used for making leather treatment and ink.

items.name: Rough Shell
items.description: Sea shells that can be used for certain crafting recipes or ground up and used by masons.

items.name: Crushed Rough Shells
items.description: Ground sea shells. Can be used by a mason to make more refined bricks.

items.name: Salt
items.description: Sea salt. Could be used to cook something tasty.

items.name: Briny Guppi
items.description: A fish found in shallow lakes and rivers. Can be used to cook food or as bait and a source of shells.

items.name: Briny Argus
items.description: A fish found in the deeper parts of lakes and some rivers. Can provide fish oil, food and also be used as chum for ocean fishing.

items.name: Briny Argus Filet
items.description: A filet from a fish from the deeper parts of a lake. Could be used for food or to make fertilizer for farming.

items.name: Briny Linus Filet
items.description: A filet from a fish from the ocean. Could be used to make food.

items.name: Briny Argus Products
items.description: Filets of fish from a Lake Fish. Can also provide Fish Oil.

items.name: Briny Linus Products
items.description: Filets of fish from an Ocean Fish. Can also provide Fish Oil or Scales.

items.name: Briny Linus Scale
items.description: A fish scale crystalized by the salt in the ocean. Svim would be interested in this.

items.name: Basic Chum
items.description: Can be used to chum fishing nodes in the ocean. Once chummed, nodes remain fishable for 15 minutes.

items.name: Basic Embergrain Flour
items.description: A pile of Embergrain Flour. Could be used to bake something.

items.name: Basic Embergrain Dough
items.description: A dough ball made of Embergrain Flour.

items.name: Basic Crop Oil
items.description: Oil made from mashing starbulbs. Could be used to make wood treatment at a scholar station.

items.name: Rough Plant Fiber
items.description: A strong piece of plant fiber. Could be used to build or craft something.

items.name: Basic Mushroom
items.description: A plump mushroom that looks edible and quite hearty. Probably better cooked.

items.name: Basic Clay Lump
items.description: A lump of clay. Could be used to build or craft something, or even pave the ground.

items.name: Basic Berry
items.description: A juicy edible berry. Probably better cooked.

items.name: Basic Flower
items.description: A flower that could be grinded up to make pigment or used to make tea.

items.name: Mallet
items.description: A basic tool that could be used for constructing buildings or terraforming land.

items.name: Coconut Hat
items.description: The one, the only coconut hat. All that for this, huh?

items.name: Plain Cooked Berries
items.description: Berries that have been cooked into a mushy mess. Tasty enough though.

items.name: Plain Mushroom Skewer
items.description: Mushrooms roasted on a fire skewered on a stick.

items.name: Plain Roasted Meat
items.description: Meat cooked on an open fire.

items.name: Plain Mashed Bulbs
items.description: Mashed starbulbs. Tasty and filling but not overly interesting.

items.name: Plain Skewered Baitfish
items.description: Small fish skewered on a stick and cooked on a fire.

items.name: Plain Roasted Fish
items.description: Filets from a fresh water fish roasted on a fire.

items.name: Plain Roasted Ocean Fish
items.description: Filets from an ocean fish roasted on a fire.

items.name: Plain Bread
items.description: Bread made from flour. Tasty by itself but it could be used to make sandwiches.

items.name: Plain Fish and Bulbs
items.description: Fish arranged in a dish with salty fried potatoes. Delicious and filling.

items.name: Plain Ground Meat and Mashed Bulbs
items.description: Ground meat served with a side of potatoes with onions. Delicious and filling.

items.name: Plain Meat Sandwich
items.description: A piece of meat and some onions stuck between two delicious pieces of bread.

items.name: Plain Raw Berry Pie
items.description: An unbaked pie. Bake it in an oven to eat it!

items.name: Plain Berry Pie
items.description: Smells delicious. You can hardly wait to eat it.

items.name: Plain Mushroom Stuffed Bulbs
items.description: Onions stuffed with wild mushrooms.

items.name: Plain Raw Bulb Rolls
items.description: Uncooked onion rolls. Cook them in an oven to eat them!

items.name: Plain Bulb Rolls
items.description: Warm, tasty onion rolls.

items.name: Plain Hot Tea
items.description: A tea that warms your body. Could keep you warm in even the harshest of cold environments.

items.name: Plain Chilling Tea
items.description: A tea that cools your body. Could keep you cool in even the harshest of hot environments.

items.name: Ancient Research
items.description: Ancient research. A scholar would be very interested in this.

items.name: Hunter's Bow Recipe
items.description: A schematic for how to make a more advanced bow.

items.name: Blacksmith's Key Recipe
items.description: A schematic for how to make a key to open doors in ancient ruins.

items.name: Stone Brazier Blueprint
items.description: A schematic for how to make a stone brazier.

items.name: Blacksmith's Key
items.description: A key forged by a blacksmith.

items.name: Intricate Key
items.description: A complex key made from other ancient keys.

items.name: Rough Repaired Ancient Gear
items.description: A repaired component using crafted materials. Heimlich would be interested in this.
